description: Ground truth benchmark cases for the BioThings plugin agent pipeline (relevancy-analysis → site-inspection → plugin-generator).

cases.name: ECBD (European Chemical Biology Database)
cases.test_prompt: Evaluate the European Chemical Biology Database (ECBD) at https://ecbd.eu for BioThings ingestion

relevancy.rationale: Primary HTS screening data, bioprofiling, and negative results not in ChEMBL/BioThings; CC-BY 4.0; public bulk download with no login

plugin.notes: Multi-file: bioactives.csv + fragments.csv + nuisance_set.csv. on_duplicates ignore because IDs may span files.

cases.name: SIGNOR 4.0 (PhosphoSIGNOR)
cases.test_prompt: Evaluate SIGNOR 4.0 at https://signor.uniroma2.it for BioThings ingestion

relevancy.rationale: Causal signaling interactions with PTM residue-level annotations, signed/directed edges, and confidence scores not in any BioThings source; CC-BY 4.0

plugin.notes: PhosphoSIGNOR API endpoint (role=all&format=tsv). groupby aggregation on signor_id. 13,411 docs in reference run.

cases.name: Harmonizome 3.0
cases.test_prompt: Evaluate Harmonizome 3.0 at https://maayanlab.cloud/Harmonizome for BioThings ingestion

relevancy.rationale: Aggregator with heavy upstream overlap with existing MyGene.info sources (GO, KEGG, CTD); CC-BY-NC requires review; pending.api roster must be checked for existing harmonizome/enrichr plugin

cases.notes: NEEDS_REVIEW due to: (1) CC-BY-NC license, (2) pending.api overlap risk, (3) requires scoped ingestion to additive datasets only. A plugin WAS generated for Achilles subset — 4,831 docs.

cases.name: Therapeutic Target Database (TTD) 2026
cases.test_prompt: Evaluate the Therapeutic Target Database (TTD) 2026 at https://idrblab.org/ttd/ for BioThings ingestion

relevancy.rationale: No documented bulk download or API — web interface only; CC-BY-NC; underlying bioactivity largely from ChEMBL/BindingDB/PubChem already in BioThings; unique value is curated druggability status

cases.name: GENCODE 2025 (Release 47)
cases.test_prompt: Evaluate GENCODE 2025 (Release 47 human / M36 mouse) at https://www.gencodegenes.org for BioThings ingestion

relevancy.rationale: GENCODE IS the Ensembl human/mouse gene build already in MyGene.info; only transcript-level tags (MANE Select, APPRIS, biotypes) are genuinely additive; scope must be defined before plugin work

cases.name: Gene Ontology Knowledgebase 2026
cases.test_prompt: Evaluate the Gene Ontology Knowledgebase 2026 at https://geneontology.org for BioThings ingestion

relevancy.rationale: GO is already a core MyGene.info source; re-ingesting as new datasource is redundant; novelty = 1/5; only GO-CAM models might be additive but require separate verification

cases.name: GoFCards (Gain-of-Function Cards)
cases.test_prompt: Evaluate GoFCards at http://www.genemed.tech/gofcards for BioThings ingestion

relevancy.rationale: Openness FAIL: bulk download requires login/registration — hard blocker per pipeline decision rules. CC-BY-NC adds additional risk. Data is otherwise relevant and novel.

cases.name: CircTarget
cases.test_prompt: Evaluate CircTarget at https://circtarget.cn for BioThings ingestion

relevancy.rationale: No stated data license is a hard blocker per decision rules; RAR archive format not supported by BioThings Hub dumper; circRNA-RNA interactions are novel but entity type is non-core BioThings

cases.name: RNAcentral 2026
cases.test_prompt: Evaluate RNAcentral 2026 at https://rnacentral.org for BioThings ingestion

relevancy.rationale: ncRNA cross-references moderately novel for BioThings; CC0 fully open; FTP bulk download. NEEDS_REVIEW because scope must be defined (per-db TSVs preferred over 1.7 GB superset) and gene-level entries are API-only in release 26.

plugin.notes: Multi-file (hgnc.tsv + ensembl_gencode.tsv + refseq.tsv + mirbase.tsv). human-only (taxon 9606). Reference run produced a plugin.
